name: J. R. R. Tolkien
bio: English writer and philologist best known for high fantasy.

name: Ursula K. Le Guin
bio: American author of speculative fiction and essays.

name: Isaac Asimov
bio: American writer and professor of biochemistry; prolific science fiction author.

name: N. K. Jemisin
bio: American speculative fiction writer and Hugo Award winner.

name: Frank Herbert
bio: American science fiction author best known for the Dune saga.

name: Octavia E. Butler
bio: American science fiction author and MacArthur Fellow.
